# Sword of the Fallen
# https://rotfserver.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Sword%20of%20the%20Fallen&prop=wikitext

{{ItemInfo
| name = Sword of the Fallen
| slot = sword
| tier = UT
| rarity = h
| desc = Once posessed by the King of the Giants, the sword is the most powerful one within the realm.

| rof = 90
| range = 
| projSpeed = 10
| lifetime = 520
| minDmg = 275
| maxDmg = 320
| feedp = 500
| fameb = 6
   
| bonuses = {{Stat|att|2}} {{Stat|dex|2}}

|lootbag = white
|dropsFrom = is obtained from the Cave of a Thousand Treasures|effects = +2 dexterity , +2 attack|range2 = 4.7}}

<noinclude>
[[Category:Swords]]
{{NavSwords}}
</noinclude>
